ayahs.text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

ayahs.text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Lord of the worlds -

ayahs.text: الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: The Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,

ayahs.text: مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
ayahs.translation: Sovereign of the Day of Recompense.

ayahs.text: إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ
ayahs.translation: It is You we worship and You we ask for help.

ayahs.text: الم
ayahs.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem.

ayahs.text: ذَٰلِكَ الْكِتَابُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًى لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahs.translation: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allah -

ayahs.text: الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنْفِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them,

ayahs.text: وَالَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَا أُنْزِلَ مِنْ قَبْلِكَ وَبِالْآخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahs.translation: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muhammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahs.text: أُولَٰئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِنْ رَبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahs.translation: Those are upon [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.

ayahs.text: الم
ayahs.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem.

ayahs.text: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
ayahs.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence.

ayahs.text: نَزَّلَ عَلَيْكَ الْكِتَابَ بِالْحَقِّ مُصَدِّقًا لِمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَأَنْزَلَ التَّوْرَاةَ وَالْإِنْجِيلَ
ayahs.translation: He has sent down upon you, [O Muhammad], the Book in truth, confirming what was before it. And He revealed the Torah and the Gospel.

ayahs.text: مِنْ قَبْلُ هُدًى لِلنَّاسِ وَأَنْزَلَ الْفُرْقَانَ ۗ إِنَّ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ اللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌ ۗ وَاللَّهُ عَزِيزٌ ذُو انْتِقَامٍ
ayahs.translation: Before, as guidance for the people. And He revealed the Criterion. Indeed, those who disbelieve in the verses of Allah will have a severe punishment, and Allah is Exalted in Might, Owner of Retribution.

ayahs.text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, from Allah nothing is hidden in the earth or in the heaven.

ayahs.text: يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ...
ayahs.translation: O mankind, fear your Lord, who created you from one soul...

ayahs.text: وَآتُوا الْيَتَامَىٰ أَمْوَالَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا تَتَبَدَّلُوا الْخَبِيثَ بِالطَّيِّبِ...
ayahs.translation: And give to the orphans their properties and do not substitute the defective [of your own] for the good [of theirs]...

ayahs.text: وَإِنْ خِفْتُمْ أَلَّا تُقْسِطُوا فِي الْيَتَامَىٰ فَانْكِحُوا مَا طَابَ لَكُمْ...
ayahs.translation: And if you fear that you will not deal justly with the orphan girls, then marry those that please you...

ayahs.text: وَآتُوا النِّسَاءَ صَدُقَاتِهِنَّ نِحْلَةً ۚ فَإِنْ طِبْنَ لَكُمْ عَنْ شَيْءٍ...
ayahs.translation: And give the women [upon marriage] their [bridal] gifts graciously...

ayahs.text: وَلَا تُؤْتُوا السُّفَهَاءَ أَمْوَالَكُمُ الَّتِي جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ قِيَامًا...
ayahs.translation: And do not give the immature your property which Allah has made a means of support for you...

ayahs.text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَوْفُوا بِالْعُقُودِ...
ayahs.translation: O you who have believed, fulfill [all] contracts...

ayahs.text: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تُحِلُّوا شَعَائِرَ اللَّهِ...
ayahs.translation: O you who have believed, do not violate the rites of Allah...

ayahs.text: حُرِّمَتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَيْتَةُ وَالدَّمُ وَلَحْمُ الْخِنْزِيرِ...
ayahs.translation: Prohibited to you are dead animals, blood, the flesh of swine...

ayahs.text: يَسْأَلُونَكَ مَاذَا أُحِلَّ لَهُمْ ۖ قُلْ أُحِلَّ لَكُمُ الطَّيِّبَاتُ...
ayahs.translation: They ask you, [O Muhammad], what has been lawful for them. Say, 'Lawful for you are [all] good foods...'

ayahs.text: الْيَوْمَ أُحِلَّ لَكُمُ الطَّيِّبَاتُ ۖ وَطَعَامُ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْكِتَابَ...
ayahs.translation: This day [all] good foods have been made lawful for you, and the food of those who were given the Scripture is lawful for you...

ayahs.text: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَجَعَلَ الظُّلُمَاتِ وَالنُّورَ...
ayahs.translation: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, who created the heavens and the earth and made the darkness and the light...

ayahs.text: هُوَ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ طِينٍ ثُمَّ قَضَىٰ أَجَلًا...
ayahs.translation: He it is who created you from clay and then decreed a term...

ayahs.text: وَهُوَ اللَّهُ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَفِي الْأَرْضِ ۖ يَعْلَمُ سِرَّكُمْ وَجَهْرَكُمْ...
ayahs.translation: And He is Allah, [the only deity] in the heavens and the earth. He knows your secret and what you make public...

ayahs.text: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِمْ مِنْ آيَةٍ مِنْ آيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
ayahs.translation: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord but they are from it turning away.

ayahs.text: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا بِالْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَاءَهُمْ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَأْتِيهِمْ أَنْبَاءُ مَا كَانُوا بِهِ يَسْتَهْزِئُونَ
ayahs.translation: For they had denied the truth when it came to them, but there is coming to them the news of what they used to ridicule.

ayahs.text: المص
ayahs.translation: Alif, Lam, Meem, Sad.

ayahs.text: كِتَابٌ أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُنْ فِي صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِنْهُ...
ayahs.translation: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muhammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom...

ayahs.text: اتَّبِعُوا مَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ مِنْ رَبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا مِنْ دُونِهِ أَوْلِيَاءَ...
ayahs.translation: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies...

ayahs.text: وَكَمْ مِنْ قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنَاهَا فَجَاءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيَاتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَائِلُونَ
ayahs.translation: And how many a city have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to it by night or while they were sleeping at noon.

ayahs.text: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَاهُمْ إِذْ جَاءَهُمْ بَأْسُنَا إِلَّا أَنْ قَالُوا إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَالِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, 'Indeed, we were wrongdoers.'

ayahs.text: يَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْأَنْفَالِ ۖ قُلِ الْأَنْفَالُ لِلَّهِ وَالرَّسُولِ...
ayahs.translation: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the bounties [of war]. Say, 'The [decree as to] bounties is for Allah and the Messenger...'

ayahs.text: إِنَّمَا الْمُؤْمِنُونَ الَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَجِلَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ...
ayahs.translation: The believers are only those who, when Allah is mentioned, their hearts become fearful...

ayahs.text: الَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ الصَّلَاةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَاهُمْ يُنْفِقُونَ
ayahs.translation: Who establish prayer and spend from what We have provided them.

ayahs.text: أُولَٰئِكَ هُمُ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ حَقًّا ۚ لَهُمْ دَرَجَاتٌ عِنْدَ رَبِّهِمْ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ وَرِزْقٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: Those are the believers in truth. For them are degrees [of high position] with their Lord and forgiveness and a noble provision.

ayahs.text: كَمَا أَخْرَجَكَ رَبُّكَ مِنْ بَيْتِكَ بِالْحَقِّ وَإِنَّ فَرِيقًا مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ لَكَارِهُونَ
ayahs.translation: [It is] just as when your Lord brought you out of your home in truth, while indeed, a party among the believers were unwilling.

ayahs.text: بَرَاءَةٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ إِلَى الَّذِينَ عَاهَدْتُمْ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
ayahs.translation: [This is a declaration of] disassociation, from Allah and His Messenger, to those with whom you had made a treaty among the polytheists.

ayahs.text: فَسِيحُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ أَرْبَعَةَ أَشْهُرٍ وَاعْلَمُوا أَنَّكُمْ غَيْرُ مُعْجِزِي اللَّهِ...
ayahs.translation: So travel freely, [O disbelievers], throughout the land [during] four months but know that you cannot cause failure to Allah...

ayahs.text: وَأَذَانٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ إِلَى النَّاسِ يَوْمَ الْحَجِّ الْأَكْبَرِ...
ayahs.translation: And [it is] an announcement from Allah and His Messenger to the people on the day of the greater pilgrimage...

ayahs.text: إِلَّا الَّذِينَ عَاهَدْتُمْ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَنْقُصُوكُمْ شَيْئًا...
ayahs.translation: Excepted are those with whom you made a treaty among the polytheists and who then have not fallen short of you in anything...

ayahs.text: فَإِذَا انْسَلَخَ الْأَشْهُرُ الْحُرُمُ فَاقْتُلُوا الْمُشْرِكِينَ حَيْثُ وَجَدْتُمُوهُمْ...
ayahs.translation: And when the sacred months have passed, then kill the polytheists wherever you find them...

ayahs.text: الر ۚ تِلْكَ آيَاتُ الْكِتَابِ الْحَكِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the wise Book.

ayahs.text: أَكَانَ لِلنَّاسِ عَجَبًا أَنْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِنْهُمْ أَنْ أَنْذِرِ النَّاسَ...
ayahs.translation: Have the people been amazed that We revealed to a man from among them, [saying], 'Warn mankind...'

ayahs.text: إِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ اللَّهُ الَّذِي خَلَقَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ فِي سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ...
ayahs.translation: Indeed, your Lord is Allah, who created the heavens and the earth in six days...

ayahs.text: إِلَيْهِ مَرْجِعُكُمْ جَمِيعًا ۖ وَعْدَ اللَّهِ حَقًّا ۚ إِنَّهُ يَبْدَأُ الْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُ...
ayahs.translation: To Him is your return all together. [It is] the promise of Allah which is truth. Indeed, He begins the creation and then repeats it...

ayahs.text: هُوَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ الشَّمْسَ ضِيَاءً وَالْقَمَرَ نُورًا وَقَدَّرَهُ مَنَازِلَ...
ayahs.translation: It is He who made the sun a shining light and the moon a derived light and determined for it phases...
